header.title: Software Engineer III (Full Stack)
header.nationality: Nationality: Indian | Student visa: 20 h/week, full-time in semester breaks | Full-time from early 2027

summary: Full Stack Engineer with 7+ years in enterprise .NET and React systems, specialized in legacy modernization: stabilizing the platforms other teams avoid and surfacing their failures before customers report them. Now in Germany for an M.Sc. at Hochschule Heilbronn, building a long-term career here.

bullets: Architected a real-time health monitoring system (React, .NET microservices, scheduled jobs, Azure Workbooks) covering 50+ production applications worldwide; cut failure detection from 8-10 hours to 10-15 minutes and shipped alerts carrying contextual error detail for faster root-cause identification.
Stabilized a legacy subscription management system serving 50K vendors and 1 million international members, cutting support tickets by roughly 30% over the following year.
Drove the TFS-to-Git migration, .NET framework upgrades, and automated CI/CD across the legacy estate, cutting deployment time from 2-3 hours to about 1 hour.
Converted monolithic legacy modules into versioned NuGet packages, eliminating version inconsistencies across the 200+ applications in the legacy estate.
Built .NET 8 microservices with RabbitMQ and Web API to restructure member subscription processing.
Led the team through PI planning, turning business requirements into delivery commitments and documenting the trade-offs behind them; mentored 4-5 junior developers.
Shipped features into legacy C# Windows applications and kept the older VB-based apps running.

experience.role: Junior Software Engineer, promoted to Senior (2020)
bullets: Built an in-house Alexa skill end-to-end (front-end and back-end) during the 2018 voice-assistant wave, feeding and managing its content pipeline.

Modernized a high-traffic, multi-role POS portal from AngularJS through a hybrid architecture to Angular; owned back-end services and stored procedures supporting 50K orders across peak summer seasons.

Rebuilt a rehabilitation-facility ERP from classic ASP to Angular, modernizing the back-end and handling enrollment, therapy scheduling, and billing to partner foundations for 300-400 concurrent patients.

Digitized a gene-testing lab's paper-based intake with a React front-end over a multi-stack back-end, and built the ETL pipeline feeding a long-term patient health-data store across 150-180 partner clinics.
Promoted to Senior in 2020; owned code review and pair programming for the team's junior developers from then on.

education.degree: Master of Science in Software Engineering and Management
Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering

projects.title: Personal Site & Always-Current CV
projects.subtitle: Design, Build, Automation
bullets: Built a React portfolio with all content in a single JSON file, so copy changes never touch component code
Set up a GitHub Actions pipeline that compiles the English and German CVs from LaTeX on every push, keeping the downloadable PDFs always current
Open source; the repository doubles as a verifiable, hands-on skills sample

projects.title: AI Tool Adoption in Academic Research
projects.subtitle: Graduate coursework project (1st semester)
bullets: Designed and ran a survey of researchers using AI tools: 36 responses over 29 days, analyzed with descriptive statistics and hand-coded free-text answers
78% of respondents reported productivity gains, while reliability gaps were eroding their trust in the tools
Reported findings on tool fragmentation, pricing models, and workflow friction, with recommendations for consolidating on fewer tools
